headline: There’s Big Money to Be Made in European Real Estate
summary: Though Henry Cabot Lodge III comes from a long line of high-profile politicians, he decided make his mark in finance instead.

raw.headline: There’s Big Money to Be Made in European Real Estate

headline: Freedom Bank Welcomes Sheila K. Stabile to Board of Directors
summary: Freedom Financial Holdings, Inc. (OTCQX: FDVA) announced the appointment of Sheila K. Stabile to its Board of Directors. Ms. Stabile brings a wealth of experience in relationship-centered leadership, business development, and community engagement, further strengthening Freedom Bank's commitment to supporting clients and communities.
